response.justification: Sarah Smith brings over 15 years of hands-on software development experience and some entrepreneurial spirit via GISCollective, but the profile is fundamentally misaligned with a Director-level AI strategy role. Her AI exposure is limited to the most recent position (MCP tooling, agentic workflows since April 2025), lacks depth in ML/AI systems design, and there is no evidence of strategic customer advisory work, cloud platform strategy, or the organizational influence expected at the Principal/Director IC level. The academic background (BS in CS, BA in Photography) does not include the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field.
strengths: 15+ years of continuous software engineering experience across diverse stacks, industries, and system types
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform serving real NGO use cases
Community engagement through workshops, conference talks, and open-source libraries demonstrates knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No demonstrated Director-level IC or principal engineering leadership; career arc is consistently hands-on senior/staff individual contribution
AI expertise is nascent and narrow — limited to MCP tooling since April 2025, with no evidence of ML system design, AI product ownership, or recognized thought leadership in AI
No cloud platform strategy experience or customer-advisory background; role requires advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption at scale

key_factors.factor: Breadth of experience and entrepreneurial background
